title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at V-Mart Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at V-Mart Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
